item.title: Do not fall into this trap #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #psychologypodcast #mentalhealthtelugu #childprotection #socialawareness #humanbehavior #telugucreator #educationalpodcast #deeptalks #awarenessmatters #telugucontentcreator

item.title: Can a PS5 cook an egg?
🚨 VIJAY MASS Oath Speech TRANSLATED in TELUGU 🇪🇸 🔊| Aye Jude ✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the dramatic end to the Tamil Nadu election chaos as Vijay reportedly met Governor Vishwanath for the fifth time with support from 120 MLAs of Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam. Following this, permission was reportedly granted for TVK to form the government in Tamil Nadu. The video also highlights key moments from Vijay’s oath-taking speech, attended by his parents including filmmaker S. A. Chandrasekhar. Vijay emotionally spoke about coming from a middle-class assistant director’s family and reaching this stage through hard work and perseverance. He promised to focus on women’s welfare, education, equality, and transparent governance, while stressing secular values and fair treatment for all communities. The video also points out the strong support from female voters in this election. With Vijay declaring the beginning of a “new era” in Tamil Nadu, how will his leadership shape the state’s future from here?

item.title: 🚨BREAKING VIJAY Sworn in as NEW CM , Trisha,Rahul Gandhi | 120 Number Game Explained | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨BREAKING VIJAY Sworn in as NEW CM , Trisha,Rahul Gandhi | 120 Number Game Explained | VR Raja
🤯 Congress REVENGE on DMK! Why they Backstabbed Stalin for 2013? | VR Raja 🚩 SUVENDU ADHIKARI Becomes Bengal CM! The TRAGIC Incident Investigation Updates | VR Raja ✈️ Governor's Last Minute FLIGHT Cancel! The High-Voltage Drama at Raj Bhavan | VR Raja 🕵️‍♂️ Midnight FORGERY Case on TVK? The DIRTY Politics Behind the Swearing-in | VR Raja
తమిళనాడులో దళపతి విజయ్ ముఖ్యమంత్రిగా పట్టాభిషేకం: 60 ఏళ్ల ద్రావిడ కోటలని బద్దలు కొట్టిన హిస్టారికల్ మూమెంట్!
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Tamil Nadu and West Bengal politics lo jarigina mind-blowing updates gurinchi matladukundam. 60 yellu ga DMK, AIADMK matrame rule chesina Tamil Nadu lo, Thalapathy Vijay yela CM seat dakkunchunnadu? 118 magic figure kosam aadi nundi antham varaku jarigina physical and political struggles yenti? Governor flight cancel chesukuni mari Vijay ki enduku appointment icharu? Inko pakka, 2013 nati paga ni Congress party DMK meeda yela teerchukundi? West Bengal lo Suvendu Adhikari first BJP CM ga pramana sveekaram chesina vela, aayana aide incident lo bayatapadda shocking professional updates yento deep ga analyze cheddam.
In this high-octane political analysis, we cover: 🔸 The Oath Ceremony: Detailed look into Vijay’s swearing-in at Nehru Stadium and his new cabinet members. 🔸 The Numbers Game: How the 113 number jumped to 120 with the support of VCK, Left parties, and the midnight signature drama. 🔸 Governor’s Dilemma: The inside story of why Governor Arlekar almost left for Kerala and what happened during the 6:30 PM meeting. 🔸 Congress's Revenge: The 13-year-old secret of 2013 that led Congress to dump DMK and join hands with TVK. 🔸 Bengal’s New Era: Suvendu Adhikari’s journey from being insulted in 2011 to becoming the first BJP CM of Bengal. 🔸 Investigation Updates: The professional contract incident investigation in West Bengal and the shocking details of the vehicle involvement. 🔸 UFO FILES Alert: A special update about today's evening facts video regarding Trump's released alien files!
Vijay leadership lo Tamil Nadu future yela untundi anukuntunnaru? Kinda comment section lo mee opinion cheppandi! 👇
#VRRaja #ThalapathyVijay #SuvenduAdhikari #TamilNaduPolitics #WestBengalElections #IndianPolitics #CoalitionGovernment

item.title: 🚨TVK Mass 107 Resignations? 🤯|Vijay’s BIGGEST Political Mistake 😨 | Aye Jude ✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the intense political drama unfolding in Tamil Nadu after the elections. Reports say that after support from Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi (VCK), Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam briefly touched the majority mark of 118 seats. Soon after, Vijay reportedly met Governor Vishwanath for the third time, but fresh conditions proposed by VCK created new complications. As of now, TVK is still struggling to secure a stable majority. The video also discusses statements made by political commentators like S. Gurumurthy and P. Chidambaram. Meanwhile, M. A. Baby from CPI reportedly backed TVK, saying alliances between DMK and AIADMK would not be morally right for the public. With strategy, alliances, and pressure changing every hour, will Vijay finally form the government or lose the opportunity at the last moment?

సీఎం సీటుకి ఒక్క అడుగు దూరంలో ఆగిపోయిన దళపతి విజయ్.. వెస్ట్ బెంగాల్ లో కొత్త చరిత్ర సృష్టించిన సువేందు అధికారి!
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, Tamil Nadu and West Bengal lo jarugutunna high-tension political drama gurinchi matladukundam. Vijay 118 magic figure ni reach avvadam lo enduku fail ayyaru? Aa missing 2 signatures venuka unna secret enti? VCK and IUML aadina mind games yela Vijay aashalani debba teesayi? In this deep dive into the current political crisis, we cover: 🔸 The Signature Mystery: Why Thalapathy Vijay could only submit 116 signatures instead of 118 and the Governor's rejection. 🔸 Alliance Drama: VCK's shocking demand for the Deputy CM post and IUML's overnight flip to support DMK. 🔸 Technical Blunder: How submitting Congress signatures alongside TVK changed the game from single-largest party to a coalition requirement. 🔸 The Unthinkable Rumor: Will historic rivals DMK and AIADMK join forces just to stop Vijay from becoming CM? 🔸 Bengal's New Era: The untold political journey of Suvendu Adhikari, from being Mamata's shadow to becoming the new Chief Minister. 🔸 The First Challenge: The immediate need for justice regarding the recent tragic incident involving Suvendu's close aide and maintaining state security.

item.title: 🚨ITS OFFICIAL 🚨 CM VIJAY 👑| Aye Jude ✊
item.description:
Join this channel to get access to perks: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq9kaXFyF2b6oXQ5veWdvog/join
BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the political chaos unfolding in Tamil Nadu after the election results. Reports spreading on social media claim that if Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam and All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam form a coalition, Vijay may ask his 107 MLAs from Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam to resign. Political analysts say such a move could even lead to President’s Rule in the state. A DMK spokesperson reportedly stated that DMK and AIADMK can unite when necessary despite being long-time rivals. Meanwhile, M. K. Stalin has said that DMK will not create problems for TVK for the next six months. Vijay’s repeated meetings with Governor Vishwanath have also raised questions, especially after reports that he is still hesitant about officially forming the government. With alliances shifting and uncertainty growing, who will finally take control of Tamil Nadu politics?

item.title: 🚨 Dark Reality No One Talks About | Dr.Sunitha Krishnan | Rohith Gollena #telugupodcast
item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #psychologypodcast #mentalhealthtelugu #childprotection #socialawareness #humanbehavior #telugucreator #educationalpodcast #deeptalks #awarenessmatters #telugucontentcreator

item.title: IMPORTANT DevOps Interview Question! Batch Vs. Streaming In Data Processing
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: IMPORTANT DevOps Interview Question! Batch Vs. Streaming In Data Processing
In this short, I’ll break down the difference between batch processing and streaming using a simple Parle-G biscuit analogy.
I’ve covered how batch systems process stored data together, how streaming systems handle data in real time, and where both concepts are used in DevOps, cloud, and AI systems.
If you’re preparing for backend, DevOps, data engineering, or AI interviews, this concept is something you’ll definitely come across.
Leave a like, share, and subscribe for more such breakdowns!
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the chaotic political situation unfolding after the Tamil Nadu election results. Out of 234 assembly seats, Vijay’s party Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam has emerged with 108 seats, but 118 are needed to form the government. Reports say Vijay met Governor Vishwanath, and soon after, discussions about the CM oath-taking ceremony were reportedly postponed. Meanwhile, national media is buzzing with speculation that All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam and Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam may explore coalition possibilities to cross the majority mark. At the same time, heated political disagreements are reportedly taking place involving M. K. Stalin, Rahul Gandhi, and K. C. Venugopal within Congress circles. With alliances shifting rapidly, who will finally form the government in Tamil Nadu?

Ee video lo, Tamil Nadu politics lo jarugutunna "Pokiri level" twists gurinchi matladukundam. 60 yellu ga baddha shatruvulu ga unna DMK and AIADMK, Thalapathy Vijay CM avvakunda aapataniki nijangane kalustunnara? AIADMK lo internal split vachi resort politics enduku start ayyayi? Inko pakka West Bengal lo Mamata Banerjee May 7th tarvata kuda resign cheyakapothe President Rule vasthunda? Bengal lo jarigina tragic incident valla political heatmap yela maripoindi? Ivi anni deep ga analyze cheddam.
In this deep dive into the hidden political mind games of 2026, we cover: 🔸 The Secret Alliance: Are historic rivals DMK and AIADMK joining forces just to stop TVK's rise in Tamil Nadu? 🔸 The 120 Magic Number: Why Vijay practically needs a few more MLAs for a stable government and the 3 alliance options he has. 🔸 AIADMK Resort Politics: The massive internal split within AIADMK, the pressure from Delhi, and the shifting of MLAs to Puducherry. 🔸 Bengal Constitutional Crisis: Exploring the "May 7th logic," Article 356, and the strong possibility of President's Rule in West Bengal. 🔸 The Bengal Tragedy: The shocking and heartbreaking loss of Suvendu Adhikari's key strategist and its massive impact on the state's security situation. 🔸 The Teesta Water Pact: Why Bangladesh is suddenly celebrating the Bengal election results and what it means for future water-sharing agreements.
TVK government form cheyadaniki Vijay ye alliance ni choose chesukuntadu anukuntunnaru? Kinda comment section lo mee opinion cheppandi! 👇

item.title: Hats off to your dedication 🙌. #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
Why do certain disturbing psychological conditions exist, and what does science actually say about them? In this thought-provoking episode of the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohith Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan to unpack one of society’s most difficult and uncomfortable subjects — the psychology behind pedophilic behavior, the myths surrounding it, the warning signs, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and responsible conversations. This telugu podcast takes a research-driven approach to understanding the psychological condition without sensationalism, focusing instead on education, societal responsibility, and child safety.
Many people misunderstand the difference between criminal behavior, psychological disorders, and preventive intervention. Through this powerful discussion, Sunitha Krishnan shares critical insights into how such conditions are viewed from psychological, social, and legal perspectives. The conversation explores why silence around these issues often increases danger, how communities can become more aware, and why open dialogue is essential for protecting vulnerable children. For anyone interested in psychology, human behavior analysis, mental health awareness, and child protection, this episode delivers valuable perspective in a way that is accessible for Telugu-speaking audiences.
This episode of the telugu podcast also addresses the role of family systems, social stigma, behavioral patterns, trauma, and the importance of early intervention. Instead of relying on assumptions or fear-based narratives, the discussion encourages listeners to examine evidence-based psychological frameworks that explain deviant behavior patterns. Sunitha Krishnan’s experience working with vulnerable communities brings depth to the conversation, while Rohith Gollena ensures the discussion remains practical, relevant, and understandable for everyday listeners.
The RRRshow by lazymuscle continues to bring conversations that challenge conventional thinking and push listeners toward awareness and action. From social justice issues to psychological realities that society often avoids discussing, this podcast aims to create informed Telugu content that sparks meaningful reflection. If you are someone who values deep conversations, educational storytelling, and discussions that address real societal concerns, this episode is essential viewing.
This episode is especially relevant for parents, educators, students of psychology, social workers, and anyone interested in understanding the hidden complexities of human behavior. By bringing these difficult conversations into the public domain, rohith gollena and lazymuscle create space for awareness, prevention, and informed action. Watch this telugu podcast till the end to gain deeper insights into one of the most sensitive yet important psychological discussions of our time.
If you value impactful Telugu conversations around psychology, mental health, social awareness, and truth-driven dialogue, subscribe to lazymuscle and stay tuned to the RRRshow for more conversations that matter.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #psychologypodcast #mentalhealthtelugu #childprotection #socialawareness #humanbehavior #telugucreator #educationalpodcast #deeptalks #awarenessmatters #telugucontentcreator

item.title: Claude Code EXPLAINED In 2 MINUTES!
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: Claude Code EXPLAINED In 2 MINUTES!
If I had to explain this properly, I’d break Claude Code down into these 4 layers:
Skills - Reusable instruction files Teach Claude how to perform specific tasks once, and reuse forever
CLAUDE.md - Your project memory Defines your stack, rules, and conventions so Claude doesn’t “forget” every session
MCP (Model Context Protocol) - Tool access layer Connects Claude to GitHub, Terraform, APIs so it can actually execute, not just suggest
Agent Mode - Autonomy layer Claude writes → runs → debugs → repeats… without waiting for you
Start thinking in systems, not prompts. ⚠️ But remember: Claude can still be confidently wrong. So, always review.
Subscribe for more such breakdowns!
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/

I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.

In Tamil Nadu, opposition leaders are questioning how Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam can form a government with 108 seats when 116 are needed for a majority. The video also discusses controversial remarks by Bangladeshi politician Akhtar Hossain regarding possible migration concerns after the West Bengal election results. These statements have triggered intense reactions across social media and political circles. With numbers, alliances, and political tensions rising, who will finally secure power and what impact could it have beyond state borders?

item.description:
What are the stories society often avoids discussing? In this powerful trailer from the RRRshow by lazymuscle, host Rohit Gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan for a thought-provoking conversation that challenges assumptions and brings hidden social realities into the spotlight. This telugu podcast episode opens up an important discussion around human dignity, resilience, rehabilitation, social justice, and the systems that often leave vulnerable communities unheard.
Sunitha Krishnan, one of India’s most respected social activists and co-founder of Prajwala, shares insights from years of frontline work supporting survivors and driving meaningful change. Through this exclusive conversation with Rohith Gollena, audiences will gain a deeper understanding of overlooked struggles, societal misconceptions, and why awareness-driven conversations are essential for building empathy and creating lasting social impact. This episode of RRRshow is more than a podcast; it is an eye-opening dialogue that encourages reflection and understanding.
For the Telugu-speaking audience, this podcast brings an important social issue into a relatable and impactful format. Hosted by Lazymuscle creator Rohit Gollena, the discussion blends powerful storytelling with meaningful questions that uncover truths often ignored in mainstream conversations. If you are interested in social awareness podcasts, inspirational discussions, real-life transformation stories, or educational telugu podcast content that goes beyond entertainment, this episode offers valuable perspective.
This trailer offers a glimpse into a larger conversation about resilience, empowerment, and societal responsibility. Viewers who follow lazymuscle and RRRshow know that Rohith Gollena consistently brings transformational discussions to the forefront, and this episode with Sunitha Krishnan continues that mission. It is crafted for those who seek authentic conversations around social reform, human rights, women empowerment, and untold stories that deserve attention.
Watch this telugu podcast trailer to experience a conversation that is honest, intense, and deeply relevant in today’s world. Whether you are passionate about social impact, curious about rehabilitation efforts, or looking for meaningful podcast content in Telugu, this RRRshow episode will leave you reflecting long after it ends. Subscribe to lazymuscle for more impactful conversations with thought leaders, changemakers, and voices shaping the future.
Featuring Sunitha Krishnan on RRRshow with Rohith Gollena, this episode stands as a significant addition to the growing landscape of Telugu podcasts focused on awareness, truth, and transformation. Join the conversation and become part of a community that values meaningful dialogue over noise.

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains rising tensions between the United States and China over sanctions on Chinese refineries. The issue began after China continued buying crude oil from Iran, which the U.S. considers a violation of its restrictions. The Office of Foreign Assets Control imposed sanctions, leading to a strong response from China. Chinese officials said they would support affected companies financially if needed. The video also touches on tensions around Taiwan and China’s long-standing claim over it. These developments show how economic and political conflicts are becoming closely linked. With trade, sanctions, and territorial tensions rising, could this escalate into a larger global standoff?

item.title: America War Deadline
The Dark Reality Hidden in Society #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #socialawareness
item.description:
This episode of a powerful telugu podcast on lazymuscle brings forward a conversation that many avoid but urgently needs attention. Hosted by rohith gollena as part of the RRRshow, this discussion with Sunitha Krishnan explores the psychology, societal patterns, and uncomfortable realities surrounding harmful behaviors toward children. Instead of sensationalism, this episode focuses on awareness, prevention, and understanding the root causes that society often ignores. For a Telugu-speaking audience, this podcast breaks down complex issues in a relatable and impactful way, making it one of the most important conversations in the telugu podcast space today.
Sunitha Krishnan shares deep insights from her years of experience working on the ground, explaining how such behaviors are not limited to stereotypes and how they can exist in environments people trust the most. This episode highlights the importance of education, awareness, and early conversations within families and communities. The discussion also sheds light on psychological conditioning, social silence, and the need for proactive measures to protect children. As part of the lazymuscle podcast ecosystem, this content aligns with meaningful storytelling that creates awareness while remaining informative and engaging.
Through this RRRshow episode, rohith gollena brings a structured and thought-provoking conversation that helps listeners understand warning signs, societal triggers, and preventive steps. The podcast emphasizes how awareness is the first step toward change and why ignoring these conversations only worsens the problem. This telugu podcast is crafted to resonate with youth, parents, educators, and anyone interested in understanding deeper social issues that affect future generations.
This episode stands out among telugu podcasts because it focuses not just on the issue but also on solutions, awareness strategies, and mindset shifts required to build a safer society. The discussion encourages listeners to think critically, question assumptions, and become more responsible individuals in their communities. With growing interest in meaningful and educational podcasts, this episode positions lazymuscle and RRRshow as platforms that bring real, impactful conversations to the forefront.
If you are looking for a telugu podcast that goes beyond entertainment and dives into real societal challenges, this episode delivers valuable insights. It combines storytelling, expert perspective, and awareness-driven content that aligns with what audiences are actively searching for in the podcast space. From understanding psychological aspects to recognizing social responsibility, this episode creates a complete awareness narrative for listeners.

item.title: 💔Very heart breaking #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
What happens in the shadows of society often remains unseen, unheard, and deliberately ignored. In this deeply important episode of the telugu podcast RRRshow by lazymuscle, host rohith gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan for a powerful and eye-opening conversation that uncovers disturbing realities many people are unaware of. This episode explores the hidden systems of exploitation, the misuse of vulnerable children, the psychology behind abuse networks, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and action.
Sunitha Krishnan, one of India’s most respected voices in social justice and human rights advocacy, shares years of frontline experience fighting against human trafficking, child exploitation, and abuse. Through this conversation, she reveals how silence, ignorance, and social stigma continue to enable exploitation. She explains the patterns society often fails to recognize, how vulnerable communities become targets, and why education and collective responsibility are essential to creating change.
In this intense and thought-provoking telugu podcast, rohith gollena asks difficult but necessary questions about the systems that allow exploitation to continue. The discussion focuses on child safety, trafficking awareness, rehabilitation efforts, survivor dignity, legal challenges, and the role families, institutions, and society must play in prevention. Rather than sensationalizing these issues, this RRRshow episode aims to educate viewers and create meaningful awareness.
This episode is especially important for parents, educators, young adults, and anyone who wants to better understand the realities hidden beneath surface-level discussions. Sunitha Krishnan breaks down myths, exposes uncomfortable truths, and emphasizes why awareness is the first step toward protection. Her insights challenge viewers to think critically about responsibility, justice, and how communities can stand against abuse.
The conversation also explores how exploitation often thrives through manipulation, systemic neglect, and the normalization of silence. Sunitha shares powerful perspectives on rehabilitation, restoring dignity to survivors, and creating long-term structural change. Her words serve as both a warning and a call to action for anyone who believes in building a safer society.
If you value meaningful conversations that go beyond entertainment, this lazymuscle RRRshow episode delivers one of the most essential discussions on social awareness, child protection, and human dignity. Watch this telugu podcast till the end and share it to help spread awareness. Conversations like these are not easy, but they are necessary.
This episode of RRRshow with rohith gollena is part of lazymuscle’s commitment to bringing impactful, educational, and socially relevant discussions to Telugu audiences. Through real conversations with changemakers like Sunitha Krishnan, this telugu podcast creates space for awareness, truth, and transformation.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #childsafety #humantraffickingawareness #socialjustice #awarenesspodcast #telugucontentcreator #indianpodcast #youthawareness #publicawareness #meaningfulconversations #childprotection

item.title: WHY I DON'T LIKE GADKARI 🚨- IMAKSHAY9
🚨WEST BENGAL EVM Machines TAMPERING | TMC vs BJP | MAMATA MIDNIGHT DRAMA at EVM Strong Room| VR Raja
item.description:
🚨WEST BENGAL EVM Machines TAMPERING | TMC vs BJP | MAMATA MIDNIGHT DRAMA at EVM Strong Room| VR Raja
బెంగాల్ ఎలక్షన్స్ లో హై డ్రామా! అర్ధరాత్రి ఆ స్ట్రాంగ్ రూమ్ దగ్గర మమతా బెనర్జీ ఎందుకు కూర్చున్నారు?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, present West Bengal elections lo jarugutunna dramatic events gurinchi deep ga analyse cheddam. Mamata Banerjee ardharatri EVM strong room daggara enduku 4 gantalu kurchundi? TMC party ballot boxes open chesaru ani vesina allegations lo nizam entha? Falta constituency lo 285 booths lo repolling enduku jarugutondi? EVM buttons meeda attar and tape enduku vesaru? Asalu TMC enduku panic avuthondi? Exit polls, 91 lakh voter deletions, and record-high turnout... ivanni Bengal elections results ni ela impact cheyabotunnayo clear ga telusukundam.
In this deep dive into Bengal Politics, we cover: 🔸 The Midnight Drama: Why the CM sat outside a strong room for 4 hours. 🔸 Postal Ballots vs EVMs: The reality behind the viral video of ballot boxes being opened. 🔸 Falta Constituency Irregularities: How EVM buttons were covered with tape and marked with attar. 🔸 TMC's Panic Factors: Analyzing the impact of exit polls, deleted voters, and a 90%+ voter turnout. 🔸 The Ultimate Masterplan: Why the EVM tampering narrative is being pushed right before counting day.
Join us to decode the ultimate political thriller happening in West Bengal!

item.title: Spirit Airlines Is Gone 🤯
America Might Start Attacking Again 🤯
10 Netflix Thrillers That Hook You in the First 5 Minutes

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude talks about a viral clip from cities like Bengaluru and Chandigarh, where a delivery agent was seen standing in one place for hours, raising concern online. The video quickly spread across social media, with many people saying they’ve seen similar situations in their own areas. This has led to discussions about a dangerous drug called Xylazine, which originated in the U.S. in the 1960s. The video explains how the drug affects the human body and its serious symptoms. It also highlights growing concerns about its misuse and spread. The episode discusses the steps India is taking to control such substances. With such cases increasing, is this just a viral moment or a warning sign of a bigger problem?

item.title: The Truth We Refuse to See #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #socialawareness
item.description:
What happens in the shadows of society often remains unseen, unheard, and deliberately ignored. In this deeply important episode of the telugu podcast RRRshow by lazymuscle, host rohith gollena sits down with Sunitha Krishnan for a powerful and eye-opening conversation that uncovers disturbing realities many people are unaware of. This episode explores the hidden systems of exploitation, the misuse of vulnerable children, the psychology behind abuse networks, and the urgent need for awareness, prevention, and action.
Sunitha Krishnan, one of India’s most respected voices in social justice and human rights advocacy, shares years of frontline experience fighting against human trafficking, child exploitation, and abuse. Through this conversation, she reveals how silence, ignorance, and social stigma continue to enable exploitation. She explains the patterns society often fails to recognize, how vulnerable communities become targets, and why education and collective responsibility are essential to creating change.
In this intense and thought-provoking telugu podcast, rohith gollena asks difficult but necessary questions about the systems that allow exploitation to continue. The discussion focuses on child safety, trafficking awareness, rehabilitation efforts, survivor dignity, legal challenges, and the role families, institutions, and society must play in prevention. Rather than sensationalizing these issues, this RRRshow episode aims to educate viewers and create meaningful awareness.
This episode is especially important for parents, educators, young adults, and anyone who wants to better understand the realities hidden beneath surface-level discussions. Sunitha Krishnan breaks down myths, exposes uncomfortable truths, and emphasizes why awareness is the first step toward protection. Her insights challenge viewers to think critically about responsibility, justice, and how communities can stand against abuse.
The conversation also explores how exploitation often thrives through manipulation, systemic neglect, and the normalization of silence. Sunitha shares powerful perspectives on rehabilitation, restoring dignity to survivors, and creating long-term structural change. Her words serve as both a warning and a call to action for anyone who believes in building a safer society.
If you value meaningful conversations that go beyond entertainment, this lazymuscle RRRshow episode delivers one of the most essential discussions on social awareness, child protection, and human dignity. Watch this telugu podcast till the end and share it to help spread awareness. Conversations like these are not easy, but they are necessary.
This episode of RRRshow with rohith gollena is part of lazymuscle’s commitment to bringing impactful, educational, and socially relevant discussions to Telugu audiences. Through real conversations with changemakers like Sunitha Krishnan, this telugu podcast creates space for awareness, truth, and transformation.
#telugupodcast #lazymuscles #rrrshow #rohithgollena #sunithakrishnan #childsafety #humantraffickingawareness #socialjustice #awarenesspodcast #telugucontentcreator #indianpodcast #youthawareness #publicawareness #meaningfulconversations #childprotection

item.description:

BUSINESS ENQUIRIES- Contact 📧 info@ayejude.com
In this video, Aye Jude explains the latest exit poll trends for the Tamil Nadu elections, where a new political player, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam led by Vijay, has entered the race. According to Axis My India, TVK could secure around 90–110 seats, putting it in strong competition with Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK). Meanwhile, All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (AIADMK) is expected to win around 25–30 seats. Another agency, Kamakya Analytics, suggests all three major parties may end up with similar seat counts. This could lead to a hung assembly, making government formation difficult. The video also breaks down the current political dynamics and alliances in Tamil Nadu. With such close predictions, who will finally form the government and will alliances decide the outcome?

వెస్ట్ బెంగాల్: పారిశ్రామిక స్వర్గం నుండి రాజకీయ హింస వరకు.. అసలేం జరిగింది?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, manam West Bengal యొక్క అద్భుతమైన గతం మరియు భయంకరమైన వర్తమానం గురించి మాట్లాడుకుందాం. 1950s లో ఇండియాలోనే రిచెస్ట్ స్టేట్స్‌లో ఒకటిగా ఉన్న బెంగాల్, ఇప్పుడు 24వ స్థానానికి ఎలా పడిపోయింది? అక్కడ జరిగే పోస్ట్-ఎలక్షన్ వయొలెన్స్ వెనుక ఉన్న డార్క్ రియాలిటీ ఏంటి?
In this deep-dive analysis, we cover: 🔸 The Economic Fall: How Bengal’s per capita income went from 127% of the national average to below average. 🔸 Dark Side of Politics: Real stories of post-poll violence from 2021 that will shake your conscience. 🔸 Voter List Cleansing: The truth behind SIR (Special Intensive Revision) and the removal of 91 lakh names. 🔸 The Fake Voter Mystery: Why some colonies with lakhs of people have only a few thousand verified IDs. 🔸 Enter the "Singham": Who is Ajay Pal Sharma? And why is his presence in Bengal giving nightmares to political goons?
Ee situation ki main reason political ideology aa leka systemic failure aa? Meeru em anukuntunnaro comment box lo share cheyandi! Video nachithe like chesi, mana Raja Gang lo join avvandi.

item.title: SENIOR AI Engineer Tech Stack [2026]
item.description:
Vishakha Sadhwani: SENIOR AI Engineer Tech Stack [2026]
Learning Resources: https://gdrive.openinapp.co/v2gcw
AI systems don’t run on models alone.
→ How do you deploy models on GPUs? → How do you scale inference across clusters? → How do you automate infra without breaking production?
The gap isn’t AI knowledge. It’s infrastructure understanding.
And these are the tools that actually bridge that gap 👇
1. Kubernetes (The Foundation) The operating system of modern AI. Runs your models, manages GPU clusters, keeps systems scalable.
2. Helm + Argo CD (The Pipeline) The GitOps standard. Automates deployments and keeps your infra in sync with code.
3. Claude Code (The Workflow) AI inside your terminal. Helps you debug, architect, and move faster. If you want to become an AI Solutions Architect, This is the stack that actually matters.
If you build strength here, you position yourself for cloud, platform, and AI infrastructure roles.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀

In this video, Aye Jude explains how airlines like Air India, IndiGo, and SpiceJet have raised concerns to the government about possible fuel shortages if the conflict continues. They warn that this could lead to higher ticket prices and impact the aviation sector in India. Meanwhile, Donald Trump posted that Iran had requested reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, though details remain unclear. An IRGC-linked statement suggested oil prices could rise to $200 per barrel if tensions escalate. The video also mentions a lighter moment from a White House state dinner attended by King Charles III, where a public remark drew attention. With fuel supply at risk and prices rising, how much could this situation impact everyday travel and expenses?

item.title: 👏well said sir ! #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this powerful episode of the telugu podcast series by lazymuscle, host Rohit Gollena sits down with renowned life coach Ram Jaladurgam for a deep and thought-provoking conversation on the idea that “Life Is a Test.” This episode explores how every challenge, failure, emotional breakdown, success, relationship, and decision in life becomes a test of character, patience, mindset, discipline, and self-awareness. If you are searching for motivation in Telugu, mindset transformation, emotional clarity, self-development, or practical life lessons that truly connect with real-life struggles, this conversation will resonate with you on a personal level. Fans of RRRshow, motivational podcasts, Telugu self-help content, and meaningful life conversations will find immense value in this episode featuring rohith gollena and Ram Jaladurgam. Throughout this inspiring discussion, Ram Jaladurgam shares valuable insights on handling stress, overcoming fear, building confidence, mastering emotions, and understanding why difficult phases are often the biggest turning points in life. Instead of escaping problems, this episode encourages viewers to understand the deeper purpose behind pain, pressure, rejection, failure, and uncertainty. The conversation dives into mental strength, personal growth, success habits, spiritual awareness, emotional intelligence, and the importance of self-discipline in today’s fast-moving world. This is Part 4 of my complete DevOps + AIOps end-to-end project series, where I’ll show you how to add an AI layer to your DevOps system and build a real AIOps assistant.
I’ve covered how to build an AI agent using AWS Bedrock, integrate it with Lambda functions for logs, metrics, and health checks, connect CloudWatch and Prometheus data, and create a chat-based interface using Streamlit to troubleshoot production issues in real time.
Watch till the end to see how an AI assistant can analyze your system, detect issues, and suggest fixes automatically.
Also, check out the previous parts of this DevOps project series if you haven't already!

item.description:
In this thought-provoking episode of the telugu podcast, host Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle brings an insightful conversation with renowned psychologist and life coach Ram Jaladurgam, diving deep into one of the most relatable yet rarely explored questions in modern relationships. After getting married, how happy are you really? And if life had taken a different path without marriage, would your happiness look any different? This episode of RRRshow challenges conventional thinking and encourages listeners to reflect on emotional clarity, personal fulfillment, and the true meaning of companionship.
Through a psychology-driven lens, Ram Jaladurgam breaks down how individuals perceive happiness in marriage, the expectations they carry, and the silent comparisons they make with alternate life choices. This telugu podcast explores how clarity in answering such questions reflects emotional maturity and relationship strength. Listeners will gain a deeper understanding of how self-awareness, communication, and emotional intelligence shape long-term satisfaction in marriage and relationships.
Rohith Gollena keeps the conversation engaging and relatable, making complex psychological ideas easy to understand for a wide Telugu audience. The discussion touches on relationship advice, mental health, couple dynamics, and how societal pressures influence personal happiness. Whether you are married, single, or in a relationship, this episode offers valuable perspectives that can transform how you look at commitment, happiness, and personal growth.
This besttelugupodcast episode from lazymuscle and RRRshow is designed for Telugu youth and adults who are curious about relationship psychology, life decisions, and emotional well-being. With real-life insights, practical reflections, and deep psychological analysis, this telugucreator content stands out as a meaningful conversation that goes beyond surface-level discussions and helps you think critically about your own life choices.
If you are someone who has ever questioned your happiness in relationships or wondered about the “what if” scenarios in life, this episode will resonate with you on a deeper level. Tune in to this powerful telugu podcast featuring Rohith Gollena and Ram Jaladurgam, and discover a new way of understanding happiness, marriage, and self-awareness.

item.title: 🙏🏻✨WHAT A CREATION #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #rrrshow
item.description:
In this engaging episode of the RRR Show, host Rohit Gollena from Lazy Muscle sits down with Lifeorama Sujith to explore the fascinating history, mysteries, and spiritual significance of the Sri Anantha Padmanabha Swamy Temple. This telugu podcast dives deep into one of the richest and most mysterious temples in India, located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala. Known for its hidden vaults, ancient traditions, and immense wealth, the temple continues to intrigue historians, भक्तులు, and curious minds across the world. If you are interested in Indian temples, history, spirituality, and untold stories, this episode brings you valuable insights in a simple and engaging format.
Throughout this conversation, Rohit Gollena and Lifeorama Sujith break down the origins of the Sri Anantha Padmanabha Swamy Temple, its connection to Lord Vishnu, and the significance of the deity in the Anantha Shayanam posture. The discussion also touches on the temple’s royal heritage, the Travancore kingdom, and the controversial unopened vaults that have sparked global curiosity. This RRRshow episode is designed to give listeners a balanced perspective, combining facts, cultural beliefs, and logical analysis, making it perfect for both believers and skeptics.
This lazymuscle podcast episode is crafted especially for Telugu-speaking audiences who love deep discussions, knowledge-sharing, and thought-provoking topics. Whether you are a devotee seeking spiritual understanding or someone curious about the secrets behind India’s richest temple, this episode offers something valuable for everyone. The storytelling approach keeps you hooked while delivering informative content that enhances your understanding of Indian heritage and temple architecture.
If you enjoy telugu podcast content that blends history, mystery, and meaningful conversations, don’t forget to watch till the end. Rohith Gollena brings his unique style of questioning and analysis, making this episode of RRRshow both entertaining and educational. Stay tuned for more such insightful discussions from lazymuscle, where knowledge meets curiosity in the most engaging way possible.

item.title: Same gender s*x #telugupodcast #rohithgollena #awareness
item.description:
In this thought-provoking episode of the telugu podcast, host Rohit Gollena from lazymuscle and RRRshow sits down with Dr. G. Samaram to explore a topic that is often misunderstood, rarely discussed openly, and surrounded by myths—human connections across different orientations. Instead of approaching it with judgment, this conversation takes an educational and awareness-driven perspective, helping the Telugu audience gain clarity on how emotional and physical connections work beyond traditional norms. This episode is designed to break confusion and bring a more informed outlook to listeners who are curious but may not have access to reliable information.
As conversations around identity and relationships evolve globally, many people still struggle to understand how different individuals experience attraction, bonding, and intimacy. In this episode, Rohit Gollena guides the discussion in a way that is respectful, indirect, and easy to grasp for a wider audience. Dr. G. Samaram shares insights from a medical and psychological standpoint, helping listeners understand the natural variations in human behavior without stigma. The focus is not on sensationalism but on awareness, clarity, and responsible knowledge-sharing, which makes this episode highly relevant for today’s youth and curious minds.
This telugu podcast episode also addresses common misconceptions that arise due to lack of education and exposure. Many people rely on hearsay or incomplete information, which leads to confusion and unnecessary fear. Through this discussion, lazymuscle and RRRshow aim to provide a balanced perspective that encourages listeners to think critically and understand the science and psychology behind human connections. Rohit Gollena ensures that the conversation remains accessible, relatable, and grounded in real-world understanding.
For Telugu audiences, especially younger viewers navigating modern social dynamics, this episode serves as a valuable resource. It highlights the importance of awareness, respect, and informed thinking when it comes to topics that are often considered sensitive. By keeping the tone indirect yet insightful, the podcast maintains cultural sensitivity while still delivering meaningful information. This makes it a must-watch episode for anyone interested in understanding evolving human behaviors in a simple and non-judgmental way.
If you are looking for a telugu podcast that goes beyond surface-level discussions and dives into real, meaningful topics, this episode from lazymuscle and RRRshow hosted by Rohit Gollena is worth your time. It combines knowledge, clarity, and thoughtful conversation to help you see things from a broader perspective. Watch till the end to gain a deeper understanding and share it with others who might benefit from a more informed outlook.

item.title: 3 Types of CI/CD Pipelines EXPLAINED | What Is CI/CD Pipeline?
item.description:
In this short, I’ll break down the three most important deployment pipelines every DevOps, Cloud, or MLOps engineer should understand: Traditional CI/CD, GitOps, and MLOps pipelines.
I’ve explained how push-based CI/CD works, how GitOps uses Git as the source of truth with tools like Argo CD, and how MLOps pipelines validate data, retrain models, benchmark performance, and safely deploy AI systems.
Master all three if you want to stay relevant in this Cloud/AI era.

item.title: COMPLETE DevOps Project Hands-On Demo | Part 3 | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
GitHub Repo: https://github.com/vishakhasadhwani/devops-ai-playbook
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This is Part 3 of my complete DevOps + AI end-to-end project series, where I’ll walk you through the real implementation phase as we start building and deploying our microservices-based application using modern DevOps tools.
I’ve covered how to run the project locally with Docker Compose, provision AWS infrastructure using Terraform, trigger CI pipelines with GitHub Actions, sync deployments using Argo CD, and set up an observability stack for monitoring. Also, I’ve shown how Claude Code can support modern DevOps workflows using AI tools.
This video is ideal for DevOps engineers, cloud learners, backend developers, and anyone who wants real hands-on project experience.
Watch till the end and stay tuned for Part 4, where I’ll walk you through AIOps in practice.

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: COMPLETE DevOps + AIOps End-To-End Project Walkthrough | Part 2 | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This is Part 2 of my complete end-to-end DevOps + AIOps project series, where I’ll break down the full architecture and workflow of the project using a real-world microservices e-commerce application.
I’ve covered how seven microservices run locally with Docker Compose, how infrastructure is provisioned on AWS using Terraform, how CI/CD works with GitHub Actions, how Argo CD enables GitOps deployments, and how Prometheus + Grafana power observability.
This video is ideal for DevOps engineers, cloud learners, backend developers, and anyone who wants to understand how modern production systems are actually built.
Watch till the end, and stay tuned for Part 3, where we will focus on hands-on implementation from scratch.
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vishakha.sadhwani LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vsadhwani/
Subscribe to my Newsletter: https://www.tech5ense.com/
CHAPTERS
00:00 Intro 01:01 Workflow 0 03:54 Workflow 1 05:15 Workflow 2 07:15 Workflow 3 08:04 Workflow 4 08:56 Workflow 5 10:52 Recap 11:10 Outro
-----------------------------------------------
🙋‍♀️ ABOUT ME
I’m Vishakha ☁️; A Cloud Architect and DevOps enthusiast who loves turning complex cloud concepts into simple, practical insights you can actually use. You’ll find real-world projects 💻 quick explainers ☕ and honest career advice 💬; From Kubernetes and Terraform to landing roles and building your tech brand, I keep things approachable, actionable, and a little fun so learning Cloud and DevOps actually feels exciting.
If this sounds like your vibe, hit subscribe, and let’s keep growing together 🚀
-----------------------------------------------

item.title: System Design Concepts CRASH COURSE For Beginners | End-To-End DevOps + AIOps Project | Part 1
item.description:
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This is Part 1 of my complete end-to-end DevOps + AIOps end-to end project series, where I’ll break down the core system design principles behind modern DevOps and cloud architectures and show how they connect to the project we’ll be building.
I’ve organized these concepts into five key pillars: scalability, reliability, security, performance, and observability.
Under these pillars, I’ve covered distributed systems, microservices, APIs, service discovery, load balancing, auto scaling, Kubernetes resilience, deployment strategies, and GitOps, while explaining why each concept matters in real production environments and how it will be applied inside our AWS EKS e-commerce microservices project with CI/CD automation and an AIOps layer.
Watch till the end and stay tuned for Part 2, where I’ll break down the full architecture and workflow!
CHAPTERS: 00:00 Intro 01:18 Distributed Systems 02:57 Monolith vs Microservices 05:30 API Communication 08:36 Service Discovery 10:10 Load Balancing 13:34 High Availability 15:35 Autoscaling 17:50 Reliability with Kubernetes 19:34 Security by Design 22:27 Observability 23:49 Deployment Strategies 26:18 GitOps 28:10 Conclusion

item.title: Islamophobia EXPLAINED by the numbers FACTS DON'T DISCRIMINATE
item.description:
follow us on X @ x.com/speaknsee follow us on Rumble @ speaknseeRumble follow us on Facebook @ https://www.facebook.com/speaknsee
Also join the Patron @ speaknsee.com website.
"The numbers don’t lie. 70% of global terrorism deaths come from just 5 countries that make up only 8% of the world’s population. Muslims are the biggest victims of Islamist violence, yet many still flee these countries only to push similar ideas elsewhere. This isn’t hate — it’s pattern recognition."
This video takes a critical look at Islamophobia, exploring why it's a topic of frequent debate and often perceived as an understandable response to recurring patterns. We discuss the data indicating that the majority of victims of islamic extremism are fellow muslims, and how this contributes to the broader social critique. Join us as we examine the complexities of religion and the implications of this phenomenon.

item.title: COMPLETE DevOps + AIOps End-To-End Project | Introduction | Vishakha Sadhwani
item.description:
Complete Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXkUFcIv0_b7rzZe0o_2-GOS2qn5-0OQy
This video is an introduction to my very first DevOps & AI project series, where I’ll build a complete end-to-end DevOps project with AIOps integration from scratch to help you understand how AI is integrated in the DevOps workflow.
The series is divided into 4 parts:
Part - 1: System Design Foundations Part - 2: Understanding The Project Workflow Part - 3: DevOps Project Implementation Part - 4: AIOps Integration
While discussing project workflows, I’ll be covering the necessary system design foundations, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, GitOps automation, cloud migration, monitoring, and AIOps use cases like log analysis, troubleshooting, and intelligent incident response, and also demo the complete project for you to see the final result!
This series is designed for students, DevOps engineers, cloud engineers, and software developers who want to move beyond tutorials and learn how real production systems are designed, deployed, and managed.
This can also serve as a really good resume project for 2026 DevOps jobs!
Leave a like, comment, and subscribe for more such videos.

item.title: KILL PANDYAA 🔥🔥🔥💯
item.description:
#shorts #ytshorts #incogshorts #playlikeincognito #youtubeshorts
👉 DESCRIPTION: This video is made purely for fun and entertainment. In this Telugu roast, we take a light-hearted look at the Instagram personality known as Jr Sai Pallavi. The intention of this video is not to spread hate or target anyone personally.
The first half of the video is just a fun roast, but the real point of the video comes in the second half. On Instagram, many innocent creators post reels and receive negative comments. Instead of ignoring them, some people start making angry response reels and shouting at the audience, which only creates more negativity and drama.
The message here is simple: not every comment deserves a reaction. Sometimes the best thing to do is ignore the noise and keep doing your thing.
Watch till the end and let me know what you think in the comments.
If you enjoyed the video, like, share and subscribe for more funny content and Telugu roasts.

item.description: Japanese TV is having a massive moment on Netflix, and for good reason. From the high-stakes survival of Alice in Borderland to the brutal action of Last Samurai Standing, , Japanese storytelling isn't just trending—it’s taking over. That’s why in this video we are counting down the 10 Best Japanese TV Shows on Netflix that belong right at the top of your watchlist. item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: Wait for the Twist 😅
Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?

item.title: Welcome to Chippendales
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Welcome to Chippendales.

A sprawling true-crime saga, Welcome to Chippendales tells the outrageous story of Somen "Steve" Banerjee, an Indian immigrant who became the unlikely founder of the world's greatest male-stripping empire - and let nothing stand in his way in the process. The series details the insane, darkly comedic, crime-ridden story behind the unique male revue that became a cultural phenomenon.

item.title: The Beauty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Beauty.

When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

item.title: CIA
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: CIA.

CIA centers on two unlikely partners — a fast-talking, rule-breaking loose cannon CIA case officer, and a by-the-book, seasoned and smart FBI agent who believes in the rule of law. When this odd couple are assigned to work out of CIA's New York Station, they must learn to work together to investigate cases and criminals posing threats on U.S. soil, finding that their differences may actually be their strength.

item.title: Marshals
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Marshals.

Marshals stars Luke Grimes reprising his role as Kayce Dutton. With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana. Kayce and his teammates - Pete Calvin, Belle Skinner, Andrea Cruz and Miles Kittle - must balance the high psychological cost of serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence with their duty to their families, which for Kayce includes his son Tate and his confidants Thomas Rainwater and Mo from the Broken Rock reservation.

item.title: Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action | Power BI Training | Data Analytics
item.description:
In this session, we explore Live, Interactive Power BI Dashboards – An Eye-Feast in Action and demonstrate how Power BI transforms raw data into meaningful insights through interactive dashboards.
The session covers how filters, slicers, drill-down features, and dynamic visuals help users explore data and make better business decisions.
This session is conducted by Mr. Prashyuth, who has 13+ years of experience in the IT industry, sharing practical insights on how Power BI is used in real-world projects.
In this session you will learn:
• How interactive Power BI dashboards work • Using filters and slicers effectively • Drill-down analysis in dashboards • Building visually engaging reports • Understanding the Power BI learning path and career opportunities in Data Analytics
If you are interested in learning Power BI and building a career in Data Analytics, this session will give you a clear understanding of the possibilities.

item.title: Data to Dashboards: Power BI Live Session
item.description:
📊 Data to Dashboards – Power BI Live Session
In this session, we explored the fundamentals of Business Intelligence (BI) and how organizations transform raw data into meaningful insights using Power BI dashboards.
In today’s data-driven world, understanding how data is collected, processed, and visualized is an essential skill. Tools like Power BI help businesses turn raw data into interactive reports and dashboards that support better decision-making.
🔎 What you’ll learn in this session: • What is Business Intelligence (BI) • Benefits of BI in modern organizations • Data Collection from multiple sources • Understanding the ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) process • How raw data is converted into dashboards • Introduction to Power BI and data visualization
👨‍💻 Session conducted by an industry expert with 13+ years of IT experience, sharing practical insights from real-world projects.
📲 Want to learn more about Data Analytics & Power BI? Join our WhatsApp community for updates on upcoming sessions, learning resources, and career guidance.

item.title: Going Dutch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Going Dutch.

In Going Dutch a decorated, hard-ass colonel is tasked with running the least important U.S. Army base in the world, located in the tulip-hugging, wine-chugging Netherlands.

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.

item.title: Heated Rivalry
item.description:

Old friends JD and Turk scrub in together for the first time in a long time, learning that medicine has changed; interns have changed; but their bromance has stood the test of time.

item.title: Top 10 Chinese Action Films at Their Absolute Peak
item.description:
If you love incredible fight choreography and breathtaking stunts, you need to see the best that Chinese cinema has to offer. From legendary classics to modern hits, these movies represent the absolute highest level of martial arts action ever captured on screen. In today's video get ready for some serious adrenaline as we count down ten masterpieces you can’t afford to miss! Let's get started!
00:00 Intro 00:20 IP Man 4: The Finale (2019) 01:34 Red Cliff 2 (2009) 02:40 The Foreigner (2017) 03:43 Raging Fire (2021) 04:47 Kung Fu Killer (2008) 05:59 Cliff Walkers (2021) 07:00 Man of Tai Chi (2013) 07:58 A Writer’s Odyssey (2021) 08:56 Line Walker 2 (2019) 10:01 The Last Tycoon (2012)

item.title: 10 Hottest Netflix & Prime Releases in February 2026
item.description: When it comes to the endless library of top-tier movies and shows, nobody dominates the entertainment world quite like Netflix and Prime Video. In today's video, we are marking our calendars for the 10 best releases in February from streaming giants Netflix & Prime Video. Trust us, you won't need to look anywhere else for your entertainment fix this month! item.title: RPA Workshop: Building Flows with Power Automate & UiPath (9 Feb 2026, 8:00 AM IST)
RPA UiPath Hands‑on Demo (Feb 6, 8:00 AM IST)
item.description:
This video is the recording of the second demo session from our UiPath RPA Training program by RPAVault.
In this session, you’ll get clarity on: What UiPath RPA is and how it’s used in real projects
Training flow and learning roadmap Real-time automation scenarios Career opportunities in RPA Participant questions and answers This session is useful for freshers, career switchers, and working professionals who want to build a strong foundation in UiPath automation.
👨‍🏫 Trainer: Mr. Raghava Tadikonda (11+ years of RPA experience) 🎓 Trusted by: 5000+ learners
Watch the full recording to understand how UiPath can help you move forward in your automation journey.

item.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms.

A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.

item.title: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Trek: Starfleet Academy.

Star Trek: Starfleet Academy is set in the 32nd century, a time period in the far-future of the Star Trek franchise where Starfleet and the United Federation of Planets are recovering from a cataclysmic event, as depicted in Star Trek: Discovery. It introduces viewers to a young group of cadets who come together to pursue a common dream of hope and optimism. Under the watchful and demanding eyes of their instructors, they discover what it takes to become Starfleet officers as they navigate blossoming friendships, explosive rivalries, first loves and a new enemy that threatens both the Academy and the Federation itself.

item.title: Top 10 Best Korean Series of 2025
item.description:
Korean Dramas have completely exploded in popularity, and 2025 releases prove that the hype isn’t slowing down soon for the younger generation of viewers. With such a huge industry pumping out endless stories every month, finding your next obsession this year can be a little tricky. That’s why in today’s video we’ve rounded up the Top 10 Best Korean dramas of 2025 that you’ll definitely binge through all night! Let's get started!

item.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City.

The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City takes viewers into an undiscovered world that is about so much more than religion, although the Mormon church is undeniably engrained in the culture. In the majestic mountains of Utah is a hidden social circle made up of successful women who have created their own paradise filled with luxury homes, shopping sprees and multi-million-dollar businesses and brands. With Hollywood's exclusive Sundance Film Festival in their backyards, these Type-A power-brokers are accustomed to rubbing elbows with A-listers and what party list you are on means everything. They have mastered running wildly successful enterprises by day and enjoy après ski at the finest resorts by night, all the while raising extraordinary and unconventional families. Here perfection is not an aspiration, it's a mandate. They hold themselves and each other to an extremely high standard and never hold back when things go sideways, but lord knows they are always there for each other when they need it most.

item.title: Tracker
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Tracker.

Tracker features lone-wolf survivalist Colter Shaw, who roams the country as a "reward seeker," using his expert tracking skills to help private citizens and law enforcement to solve all manner of mysteries while contending with his own fractured family.

item.title: The War Between the Land and the Sea
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The War Between the Land and the Sea.

When a fearsome and ancient species emerges from the ocean, dramatically revealing themselves to humanity, an international crisis is triggered. With the entire population at risk, UNIT step into action as the land and sea wage war.
